## Summary

Implements the first narrow task from Issue #1024: candidate-quality tuning only.

## Changes

- Adds an explicit ledger context-fit threshold constant.
- Lowers the ledger context Jaccard threshold from 0.05 to 0.03.
- Adds written-number unsupported-fact detection.
- Adds focused tests for written numbers and threshold-borderline candidates.

## Scope

Only candidate quality code and its test file changed.
